Interbulk Shipbrokers New Delhi -India <chartering@interbulkshipping.in>
Subject:
// MV CL XUCHANG / MV MILA -VESSELS TO FIX //
DATE:13TH JAN 2026
REF:IBC/PB/001
=======
WE HAVE FOLLOWING VESSEL FROM OUR CLOSE OWNER:
MV CL XUCHANG
​
61,203 DWT  MUMBAI 16-17 JAN
MV MILA 63,519 DWT  OPEN DAFENG   O/A 25-28 JAN  ABT 1100-1200MT VLSFO / ABT 200-230MT LSMGO
LAST CARGOES: IRON ORE / PETCOKE / COAL / M ORE / COAL
++++++++
MV CL XUCHANG
BUILT SEP 2022 DALIAN COSCO KHI SHIPYARD
DWT 61,203 MT AT 13.025 M (SCANTLING / SUMMER)
GT/NT 34,476 / 20,175
L/B 199.99 M / 32.24
5 HO / 5 HA
G/B 77,000 M3 / 75,553.7 M3
TPC 60.04
4 X 30 SWL / 4 X 12 CBM GRABS
MOORING: 12 * POLYESTER & POLYPROPYLENE MIXED ROPE / LENGTH 200 METERS
SPEED & CONSUMPTION:
FULL SPEED
L/ABT. 14.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT – 27.0 MTS VLSFO + 0.1MTS LSMGO
B/ABT. 14.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT - 26.0 MTS VLSFO + 0.1MTS LSMGO
ECO SPEED
L/ABT. 13.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT – 23.0 MTS VLSFO + 0.1MTS LSMGO
B/ABT. 13.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT – 22.0 MTS VLSFO + 0.1MTS LSMGO
SUPER ECO SPEED FOR REFERENCE ONLY
L/ABT. 12.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT – 19.0MTS VLSFO + 0.1MTS LSMGO
B/ABT. 12.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT – 18.0 MTS VLSFO + 0.1MTS LSMGO
PORT CONSUMPTION:
ABT 3.0 MT VLSFO + 0.1MT LSMGO - WITHOUT USING SHIP\'S CRANES
ABT 5.0 MT VLSFO + 0.1MT LSMGO - DURING CARGO OPERATION BY SHIP\'S CRANES
DURING ECO STEAMING PERIOD THE VESSEL WILL RUN AT FULL NORMAL RPM FOR ABOUT 2 TO 3 HOURS PER
DAY IN ORDER TO AVOID EXCESSIVE CARBON ACCUMULATION AND MAINTAIN THE NORMAL OPERATION OF THE
ENGINE, ADDITIONAL BUNKER CONSUMED FOR SUCH RAISE RPM TO BE FOR CHARTERERS\' ACCOUNT.
ADDITIONAL CONSUMPTION OF ABOUT 2 MT IFO PER DAY WHEN BALLASTING/DE-BALLASTING / EXCHANGE OF
BALLAST OPERATION AND CARGO HOLDS’ CLEANING, EXCLUDING BALLAST WATER TREATMENTS.
VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO USE LSMGO IN MAIN ENGINE WHILE MANEUVERING IN / OUT OF PORTS, RIVERS,
STRAITS, CANALS, SHALLOW / NARROW OR RESTRICTED WATERS.
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS, NO ADVERSE CURRENT, NO NEGATIVE
INFLUENCE OF SWELL AND NOT EXCEEDING BEUFORT SCALE FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE SCALE 3
(COMBINED WAVE HEIGHT 1.25M).
ABOUT MEANS 0.5 KNOT ALLOWANCE ON SPEED AND 5% ALLOWANCE ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION. BUNKER
SAVING TO OFFSET ANY TIME LOSS AND VICE VERSA FOR EACH VOYAGE (BALLAST AND LADEN).
NO CO2 FITTED
NO A60 BULKHEAD
WORKING COPY
AUSSIE LADDER FITTED
NEO PANAMA FITTED
DECK CARGO NOT ALLOWED
STEEL CARGO ALLOWED (2*15TONS COIL) BUT ALWAYS SUBJECT TO THE MAXIMUM OF TANKTOP STRENGTH
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
+++++++++++++++++++++++
MV MILA
GEARED (4 X 30.5T) / GRABBER (12M3 X 4)
FLAG MALTA; BUILT 2018
DELIVERY: MAY 2018
ABOUT 63,519 DWT ON 13.418M SSW
LOA 199.98M; BREADTH (MOULDED) 32.24 M
GRT ABT 35,832; NRT ABT 20,839; TPC SUMMER 61.4 MT/CM
5 HOLDS/5 HATCHES
HATCH OPENING DIMENSIONS:
NO.1: 18.4 (L) X 18.72 (B)M; NO.2-NO.5: 23.2 (L) X 18.72 (B)M
GRAIN CAPACITY : ABT 80429.78 CBM
BALE CAPACITY : ABT 76176.27 CBM
ALL DETAILS ABOUT.
SPEED/CONSUMPTION:
BALLAST ABOUT 14.00 KNOTS ON ABOUT 23.60 MT VLSFO (ME + AE) PLUS 0.1 MT LSMGO AT SEA
LADEN ABOUT 13.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT 25.00 MT VLSFO (ME + AE) PLUS 0.1 MT LSMGO AT SEA
ECO SPEED / CONSUMPTION AS GUIDANCE ONLY AND WOG (BASIS 60% MCR OPERATION):
BALLAST ABOUT 13.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 18.6 MTS VLSFO (ME + AE) PLUS 0.1 MT LSMGO AT SEA
LADEN ABOUT 12.5 KNOTS, ON ABOUT 20.0 MTS VLSFO (ME + AE) PLUS 0.1 MT LSMGO AT SEA
M/E OPERATION BELOW 40% MCR NOT ALLOWED. DURING ECO STEAMING VESSEL WILL INCREASE M/E TO FULL
SPEED ONCE EVERY 3 DAYS FOR A PERIOD OF 2 HOURS TO BLOW CARBON DEPOSITS FROM EXHAUST PASSAGES.
PORT CONSUMPTION IDLE ABOUT 2.5 MT VLSFO PER DAY; WORKING ABOUT 4.5 MT VLSFO PER DAY PLUS
0.1 MT LSMGO PER DAY.
IN PORT AND AT SEA DURING BALLASTING / DEBALLASTING ADDITIONAL CONSUMPTION OF 1.5 MT/DAY FOR
BALLAST TREATMENT PLANT USE.
ADDITIONAL CONSUMPTION ON BOILER MAY BE REQUIRED FOR HEATING BUNKERS, ACCOMMODATION ETC
IN COLD CLIMATES AND AT LOW MAIN ENGINE LOADS. ADDITIONAL CONSUMPTION IN SUCH CONDITIONS:
ABT 0.75 MT PER DAY
BOILER: COLD CLIMATE DEFINITION AS FOLLOWS ;
A. AT SEA M/E OPERATION AT NORMAL LOAD – AMBIENT TEMPERATURE BELOW 5 DEG C.
B. AT SEA M/E OPERATION AT LOW LOAD – AMBIENT TEMPERATURE BELOW 20 DEG C.
C. PORT STAY – AMBIENT TEMPERATURE BELOW 20 DEG C.
ADDITIONAL VLSFO USED DURING HOLD CLEANING OPERATIONS.
ALL FUEL NORMALLY CONSUMED IS 380CST VLSFO (ISO 8217:2017 RMG 380)
VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO CONSUME LSMGO IN MAIN ENGINE DURING STARTING STOPPAGES, IN
CONFINED WATERS, DURING CANAL PASSAGES, MANEUVERING AND IN COLD WEATHER FOR BOILER/HEATING,
BALLASTING / DEBALLASTING, EXCHANGE OF BALLAST AND DURING HEAVY WEATHER, ETC.
OWNERS WARRANT THE VESSEL IS CAPABLE OF MAINTAINING AND SHALL MAINTAIN SPEED/CONSUMPTION THROUGHOUT PERIOD OF CHARTER PARTY, BASIS GOOD WEATHER CONDITION, WINDS UP TO BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA SCALE 3 SIGNIFICANT WAWE HEIGHT OF 1,25M (TOTAL COMBINED SEA AND SWELL) WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENTS OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL,  EFFECTIVE FOR VOYAGES EXCEEDING 48 HOURS FROM BEGINNING SEA PASSAGE TO END SEA PASSAGE, EXCLUDING PASSAGE WITH RESTRICTED VISIBILITY AND CONGESTED WATERS, STRAITS, NARROWED WATERS AND WHILE FOLLOWING SLOW STEAM INSTRUCTIONS, MANOEURVING, ENTERING OR LEAVING PORTS ABD 12HRS AFTER COSP/PRIOR EOSP AND EXCLUDING PERIODS DURING WHICH REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, ETC. CLAIMS FOR UNDERPERFORMANCE SHOULD ONLY BE LIMITED TO GOOD WEATHER PERIODS; ADMISSIBLE PERIOD OF GOOD WEATHER HAS TO BE A PERIOD OF 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON TO NOON ONLY AND NO EXTRAPOLATION TO BE MADE. THE EFECT OF POSITIVE CURRENTS NOT TO BE DEBITED FROM THE VSL SPEED IN PERFORMANCE CALCULATIONS. ABOUT ON SPEED AND CONSUMPTION CLARIFIED AS MEANING 5% ALLOWANCE ON CONSUMPTION AND 0,5 KNOTS ON SPEED. THE VESSEL IS ALLOWED TO USE MARINE DIESEL OIL (ISO-F-DMB) OR GASOIL WHEN MANEUVERING AND PASSING NARROW / RESTRICTED / CONFINED WATER, INCLUDING WHEN THE VESSEL CARRIES OUT HOLD CLEANING AND BILGE PUMPING.
VESSEL CARGO HOLDS ARE CO-2 FITTED BUT WITHOUT ANY MECHANICAL VENTILATION
OWNERS GUARANTEE THE VESSEL WILL BE FITTED WITH ALL STANDARD/REGULAR/USUAL CERTIFICATES ON
BOARD AT THE TIME OF DELIVERY AND THIS TO FORM A FUNDAMENTAL CLAUSE OF THE CHARTER PARTY.
OWNERS CONFIRM VESSEL WILL BE IACS CLASSED : VESSEL’S CLASS IS NK.
OWNERS P&I CLUB – WEST OF ENGLAND
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
BWTS CLAUSE:
“VESSEL IS FITTED WITH IMO APPROVED BALLAST WATER TREATMENT PLANT FROM MIURA WHICH IS ALSO
CERTIFIED UNDER AMS BY THE USCG. THE BWTS IS OF FILTRATION + UV TYPE WITH CAPACITY OF 2 X 900
CUBICS / HOUR AND IS TO BE USED FOR BALLASTING AND DEBALLASTING OPERATIONS. IF VESSEL CALLS PORT
WHICH HAVE VERY DIRTY AND MUDDY WATERS INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO MUMBAI, MISSISSIPPI RIVER,
HOUSTON AREA, YANGTZE RIVER, RIO PARANA, AMAZON RIVER ETC THEN DUE TO VERY DIRTY WATER THE
EFFICIENCY OF THE SYSTEM WILL DROP AND ANY DELAY IN BALLASTING / DEBALLASTING OPERATIONS IN SUCH
PORTS TO BE ON CHARTERERS ACCOUNT.”
GRAB FITTINGS/OPERATION
OWNERS GUARANTEE VESSEL’S CRANES/GRABS ARE FULLY SUITABLE FOR LOADING/DISCHARGING IRON ORE.
PILOT AND HOLD LADDERS
VESSEL TO BE EQUIPPED WITH PILOT AND HOLD LADDERS IN ACCORDANCE WITH AUSTRALIAN REGULATIONS.
SEE ALSO ATTACHED DESCRIPTION SHEET.
ADA
BEST REGARDS
PARAS            MOB.: +91-9560472111
KRITIKA            MOB.: +91-9560504611
